creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 253264
Fix for two RTWN chipsets, for real.

I'm withdrawing this patch. Something went wrong when I rebased the patches to remove the locking. I'll upload a new patch on Tuesday.

This is what happens when someone gives me the bums rush on something unrelated. I will have  a lot more time on Tuesday to do this properly. Sorry about this.
